META.name: Meta Platforms
bull: DAP 3.56B คนทุกวัน = data flywheel ที่ทรงพลังที่สุดสำหรับ Social AI
Revenue Q1 2026 $56.31B +33% YoY, Operating Margin 41% record-high
PEG 0.9 — cheap relative to growth rate ในบริษัทขนาดนี้
Llama open-source strategy สร้าง developer ecosystem ขนาดใหญ่
FCF $12.39B ใน Q1 เดียว = พิสูจน์ว่าธุรกิจสร้างเงินสดได้จริง
risk: CapEx FY2026 $125-145B เพิ่ม 2x+ YoY = commitment ใหญ่สุดในประวัติ META
Reality Labs ขาดทุน ~$19B FY2025 ไม่มีทิศทาง breakeven ชัดเจน
FTC antitrust case (Instagram/WhatsApp) — ถ้าถูกบังคับขาย = thesis change ทันที
Revenue 99%+ จาก advertising = cyclical risk สูงถ้า macro อ่อนแอ
EU Digital Markets Act ลด targeting effectiveness
META.idea: AI-Enhanced Advertising + Agentic AI Platform — DAP 3.56B สร้าง data flywheel ที่ทรงพลังที่สุด; Fwd P/E 17× = cheap มากสำหรับ company ที่ +33% revenue growth + 41% operating margin

charlie.summary: Warren's biggest thesis risk (FTC divest Instagram/WhatsApp) has been RESOLVED — Meta WON the antitrust case in Nov 2025. FTC appeal filed Jan 2026 but probability of reversal very low. Fwd P/E 17× + PEG 0.89 confirmed cheap. This is MORE positive than Warren indicated.
risks: FTC appeal (Jan 2026) still pending — multi-year legal overhang but low reversal risk
CapEx $125-145B FY2026 — FCF suppression risk remains real
Reality Labs $19B/yr losses — no breakeven timeline clear

NVDA.name: NVIDIA Corporation
bull: CUDA ecosystem 7.5M developers = switching cost ที่แทบเป็นไปไม่ได้จะ migrate
Blackwell architecture รัน majority ของ Data Center revenue แล้ว
FY2026 Revenue $215.9B +65% YoY, FCF $96.6B = cash machine
Q1 FY2027 guidance $78B = growth ยังไม่หยุด
Full-stack AI factory: GPU + Networking + Software (CUDA/NIM)
risk: Valuation สูง — ต้องการ execution perfect หลายปีต่อเนื่อง
US export restrictions ต่อ China H20 chips กระทบ revenue ทันที
Customer concentration: 2 ลูกค้าแรก = 36% ของ revenue ทั้งหมด
AMD MI455X competition ใน memory bandwidth — ROCm กำลังตามทัน
Antitrust สอบสวนจากหลายประเทศเรื่อง GPU supply allocation
NVDA.idea: AI Factory Platform — Full-stack GPU+Networking+Software monopoly; Fwd P/E 19.7× = ถูกมากสำหรับ company ที่ revenue $215.9B +65% YoY + FCF $96.6B

charlie.summary: Warren's thesis confirmed. Export controls partially eased — H200 approved for China (75K chips/customer) but legal limbo means no actual shipments yet as of May 2026. NVIDIA also took $5B equity stake in Intel — shows NVDA playing long-term supply chain strategy. PEG 0.72 and 22% MoS confirmed.
risks: H200 China shipments remain blocked despite approval — revenue timing uncertain
Congressional legislation to allow 30-day review/block of chip sales to adversarial nations advancing
China AI companies (Huawei, DeepSeek) strengthening domestically — NVDA China market share at risk long-term

TSM.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
bull: N2/A16 process leadership — Intel, Samsung ยัง catch up ไม่ถึง
CoWoS advanced packaging chokepoint สำหรับ AI chips ทุกตัว
Q1 2026 Revenue +41% YoY, Gross Margin 66% = exceptional economics
PEG 0.75 — cheap relative to growth สำหรับ foundry dominance
AI Accelerator demand visibility แข็งแกร่ง — customer backlog ยาว
risk: Taiwan Strait geopolitical risk — ความเสี่ยงหลักที่ตลาดให้ discount ใหญ่
US tariff + trade policy uncertainty กระทบ supply chain
Customer concentration: Apple + NVIDIA + AMD = top 3
Intel Foundry 18A ถ้าสำเร็จ capture market share บางส่วน
Arizona/Japan fab ramp cost กด margin ระยะกลาง 2026-2028
TSM.idea: Advanced Foundry Monopoly — N2 process leadership + CoWoS chokepoint; PEG 1.26 = undervalued เมื่อเทียบกับ foundry dominance; Taiwan geopolitical discount = value opportunity

charlie.summary: Thesis intact. No new material negative developments found. ASML-Tata India partnership confirms supply chain diversification narrative beyond Taiwan = positive for TSMC reducing single-point risk perception. Geopolitical discount persists but thesis unchanged.
risks: Taiwan Strait geopolitical risk remains the primary structural discount factor
Arizona/Japan fab ramp cost guidance — watch Q2 2026 margin data
US tariff uncertainty on semiconductor supply chain ongoing

MSFT.name: Microsoft
bull: Azure +29% YoY Q3 FY2026, AI revenue accelerating — RPO backlog $627B+
GitHub Copilot 15M+ paid seats = AI productivity เข้าสู่ enterprise mainstream
M365 Copilot adoption inflect — per-seat $30/mo licensing scalable
Cloud Margins expanding = operating leverage แข็งแกร่ง
OpenAI partnership = first-mover ใน enterprise AI tooling
risk: Valuation P/E 32x เริ่มเกิน fair value ถ้า Azure growth ชะลอ
OpenAI dependency — ถ้า OpenAI เปลี่ยน strategy กระทบ MSFT
Gaming segment อ่อนแอ Activision integration cost สูง
EU antitrust investigation Teams bundling ยังดำเนินอยู่
CapEx AI infrastructure กด FCF ระยะสั้น 2026-2027
MSFT.idea: Enterprise AI Cloud Platform — Azure +29% + RPO $627B; Fwd P/E 21.8× = reasonable สำหรับ quality; MoS 26% = strong entry

charlie.summary: Azure Q3 FY2026 grew +40% YoY (Warren cited +29% from earlier — this is an UPGRADE). Revenue $82.9B, EPS $4.27 +23%. OpenAI relationship revised: MSFT no longer pays revenue share to OpenAI (margin positive), OpenAI continues paying MSFT until 2030 (revenue positive). $190B CapEx FY2026 = FCF suppression risk is real but confirmed. Bill Gates Foundation sold all MSFT shares (headline noise, not fundamental).
risks: CapEx $190B FY2026 continues to suppress FCF — market reacted negatively post-earnings despite beat
Stock fell after Q3 earnings despite beat = market expectations very high, any miss = downside
OpenAI structural relationship still evolving — long-term dependency risk remains

risk: ราคาปัจจุบันเกิน Fair Value $350 — รอ pullback ก่อน entry

VMware debt overhang จาก acquisition $69B
Semiconductor cyclicality ใน Enterprise networking
Hock Tan succession planning ระยะยาว
AVGO.idea: Custom XPU + Networking Monopoly — Google GXPU/Meta MTIA/OpenAI = exclusive partnerships; PEG 0.93 = cheap; FY2028 $15B AI target

charlie.summary: No new negative developments found. Custom XPU partnerships (Google, Meta, OpenAI) continuing. VMware integration progressing. Thesis intact.
risks: Hock Tan succession remains long-term unresolved
VMware integration debt overhang — watch free cash flow
Custom XPU customers could in-source long-term

Full-stack AI moat ที่เลียนแบบไม่ได้: Ironwood TPU + Gemini + Vertex AI + Applications
PEG 0.8 — จ่ายน้อยกว่า growth rate จริง หายากมากในกลุ่ม mega-cap

Wiz acquisition compress Cloud margin 2026

GOOGL.idea: Full-Stack AI Cloud — GCP +63% + Gemini + TPU + $460B backlog; PEG 1.56 = fair เมื่อเทียบกับ moat depth; Waymo = free option

charlie.summary: Thesis intact. GCP growth and AI moat confirmed. DOJ antitrust proceedings ongoing but no new escalations found. Waymo and Cloud backlog narrative unchanged.

charlie.summary: Thesis intact. AWS AI thesis unfolding as expected. Trainium3 shipping H1 2026 on track. No new major negative developments found.

CapEx heavy — FCF short-term suppression

ASML.name: ASML Holding
bull: EUV lithography absolute monopoly — ไม่มีทางใช้ node ล้ำๆ โดยไม่ผ่าน ASML
High-NA EUV (Twinscan EXE) รองรับ nodes 1.8nm ถึง Angstrom era
Installed base recurring revenue: service + upgrades = predictable income
HBM supercycle เพิ่ม demand layer count → ต้องการ EUV เพิ่มขึ้น

Semi cyclicality ทำให้ orders อาจชะลอในช่วง down-cycle

อ่อนไหวต่อ geopolitics EU-China
MoS เพียง 8.9% จาก FV $900 — ต้องการ pullback เพื่อ entry ที่ดีขึ้น

charlie.summary: Thesis intact. ASML announced India Tata Electronics partnership for $11B fab — signals broader geographic expansion of semiconductor ecosystem = long-term positive for equipment demand. EUV monopoly narrative confirmed.
risks: China export restrictions remain — 10-15% revenue ceiling
Semi cyclicality — orders can be lumpy
PEG 2.24 = expensive; MoS only 9.5% = less buffer

COHR.name: Coherent Corp.
bull: NVIDIA $2B equity investment + multiyear CPO supply agreement = strategic lock-in
InP laser vertical integration: controls crystal growth, wafer fab, chip design, packaging
1.6T transceiver ramp with healthy pricing; OCS TAM raised to $4B+
InP capacity doubling ahead of schedule; tripling by end 2027
Record backlog; LTAs extending through end of decade with upfront customer commitments
risk: Heavy CapEx cycle for capacity expansion pressures near-term FCF
Revenue concentration in hyperscalers -- top customers = majority of revenue
CPO timeline execution risk; competing platforms from Lumentum and Intel Photonics
InP supply chain: 3rd-party InP wafer dependency for near-term supply (pre-full ramp)
Still in early profitability phase -- GAAP profitable but Non-GAAP driven by adjustments
COHR.idea: Optical Interconnect Pure Play — NVIDIA $2B equity investment; InP vertical integration moat; 1.6T ramp now + CPO roadmap; PEG 0.92 = cheap relative to 52% growth

charlie.summary: Q3 FY2026 BEAT confirmed — revenue $1.8B, DC +40% YoY. COHR stock rallied +13% on May 11 after strong results and expanded NVIDIA partnership. CPO revenue for scale-out applications starts H2 2026 — earlier than some expected. $23B TAM raised. Warren's thesis strongly confirmed. NOTE: After +13% rally last week, current $382 is ABOVE the price Warren used ($382.45) — MoS may be thinner now.
risks: After +13% recent rally, entry point less attractive — thin MoS (7.2%) may have compressed further
CPO scale-up revenue delayed to H2 2027 (scale-out H2 2026)
InP 3rd-party wafer dependency until full ramp complete

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies
bull: US Revenue +104% YoY, Rule of 40 = 145 — growth + margin พร้อมกัน ไม่มีใครเทียบได้
AIP bootcamp model: enterprise ไป production AI ได้ใน 5 วัน — moat ที่แข่งยาก
US Government AI budget ขยายต่อเนื่อง — DoD Maven, TITAN = multi-year contract
GAAP profitable 53% net margin + $925M FCF — ไม่ต้อง dilute อีกแล้ว
FY2026 guidance +71% YoY ($7.65B) — raised 10pp จาก quarter ก่อน
risk: Valuation สูงมาก — ต้องการ execution perfect ทุก quarter ไม่มี room ผิดหวัง
Government contract concentration — ถ้า budget sequestration หรือ political shift กระทบทันที
International business เติบโตช้ากว่า US มาก — growth story concentrated ใน US
SBC (Stock-Based Compensation) ยังสูง — dilution ลดลงแต่ยังมีนัยสำคัญ
Competition จาก Microsoft, Google, Amazon ที่มี distribution scale มากกว่ามาก
PLTR.idea: Enterprise+Government AI Platform — Rule of 40 = 145; GAAP profitable 53% margin; US Revenue +104% YoY; MoS 25.5% = good despite high P/E

charlie.summary: Thesis strongly confirmed. USDA $300M contract (Apr 2026), Ukraine AI partnership expansion, described as 'default OS for federal data modernization.' Government contract pipeline expanding across multiple departments. Rule of 40 = 145 narrative intact. Warren's 25.5% MoS looks attractive.
risks: Fwd P/E 64.9× = requires perfect execution every quarter
DOGE-era government spending cuts could affect some federal contracts
SBC still elevated — dilution ongoing
International growth significantly lagging US

ARM.name: Arm Holdings
bull: Armv9 royalty rate 2x Armv8 = structural revenue uplift ทุกปี
22M+ developers ecosystem ฝังแน่นใน mobile, IoT, servers
350B chips shipped = installed base ขนาดใหญ่ที่สุดในโลก
CSS (Compute Subsystem) higher royalty tier กำลัง scale
AWS Graviton, Apple M-series = royalty revenue ใหม่ขนาดใหญ่
risk: P/E 55x ราคาสูงมาก — ต้องการ execution perfect และ growth ต่อเนื่อง
RISC-V open-source ถูกกว่า ถ้า adoption เร็วกระทบ licensing revenue
Qualcomm dispute ยืดเยื้อ — ถ้าแพ้คดีกระทบรายได้ mobile chips
SoftBank ถือหุ้นใหญ่ = overhang และ selling pressure
UK regulatory environment ไม่แน่นอน
ARM.idea: CPU IP Licensing Monopoly — CPU-Renaissance = ARM royalty growth structural; Armv9 2× royalty; ราคาปัจจุบัน = at Fair Value รอ pullback

charlie.summary: FTC investigation into ARM's chip licensing practices is a NEW risk not fully in Warren's thesis. Combined with ongoing Qualcomm dispute and RISC-V adoption pressure, the risk profile is higher than Warren's RA score of 6.0 suggests. MoS only 0.4% = essentially at fair value with elevated risk.
risks: FTC antitrust investigation into chip licensing practices (May 2026) — could challenge royalty model
Qualcomm dispute ongoing — potential royalty rate reduction risk
RISC-V open-source adoption pressure continues
SoftBank overhang — $23.28 average cost for NVDA Intel deal context: not ARM but structural concern

QCOM.name: Qualcomm
bull: DC custom silicon for hyperscaler กำลัง ship December 2026 — growth vector ใหม่นอก mobile
Automotive record $1.3B (+38% YoY) — Snapdragon Ride backlog >$45B, multi-year ramp
Snapdragon X Series ใน Windows PC กำลัง gain share — Dell, Lenovo, HP, Samsung
QTL licensing business = high-margin recurring revenue พื้นฐานแกร่งทุก cycle
IoT และ Edge AI ขยายตัวต่อเนื่อง — on-device AI เป็น next platform
risk: Apple ลด dependency บน Qualcomm modem — ความเสี่ยงระยะยาวใน handset revenue
Samsung และ MediaTek competition ใน mid-range ที่ volume สูง
China exposure: Huawei licensing + China handset OEM = regulatory risk
Handset cycle ชะลอตัว กระทบ QCT revenue ใน soft quarter
Execution risk บน custom silicon program — ล่าช้าหรือ spec miss จะกระทบ credibility
QCOM.idea: Mobile+Automotive+DC Edge AI — QTL licensing moat; Automotive $45B+ backlog; DC custom silicon Dec 2026; PEG 0.86 = cheap

charlie.summary: Apple modem transition is REAL and happening FASTER than originally expected. Apple C1 modem (made by TSMC) launched, iPhone QCOM share declining to ~20% in 2026 and ZERO by 2027. Qualcomm extended modem licensing deal through March 2027 (bridge period). Q2 FY2026 earnings beat by 16% on automotive/IoT diversification = shows pivot working. BUT the structural decline in iPhone revenue is confirmed — analyst target $175 < current $201 is well-founded.
risks: Apple C1 modem in iPhone 17 model = QCOM loss confirmed this cycle
QCOM iPhone share: ~20% in 2026, 0% by 2027 = material revenue headwind
Analyst target $175 vs current $201 = market already trading ahead of fair value
Custom silicon DC execution risk — Dec 2026 shipment unproven

AMD.idea: CPU+GPU Diversified Semiconductor — EPYC server growing; MI455X HBM bandwidth leader; PEG 1.02 = fair value; รอ pullback ก่อน add

charlie.summary: No major new negative developments found. MI455X and EPYC thesis intact. PEG 1.02 = fair value — not cheap, not expensive. Warren's caution about thin MoS (2.3%) appropriate.
risks: ROCm ecosystem gap vs CUDA persists
Intel EPYC recovery if 18A scales = server CPU share risk
PEG 1.02 = minimal margin of safety at current price

Subscriber growth ceiling ในตลาด developed markets

charlie.summary: Warren's MoS 24% looks attractive on paper. BUT: Mark's recent news entry states 'NFLX raised guidance but market reacted negatively — reflects concerns about long-term growth.' This suggests market is already skeptical. If $87 is post-split price, need to verify split ratio and fundamental consistency. Charlie cannot independently verify the split assumption.
risks: Market negative reaction to guidance raise = something spooked investors (content cost, subscriber miss details?)
If price is post-split, need to confirm split ratio for fundamental consistency
Subscriber growth ceiling in developed markets remains structural
Ad revenue cyclical — macro sensitivity

charlie.summary: Thesis intact. AI datacenter power demand narrative unchanged. Analyst target $358 < current $371 = slightly above fair value per consensus. Warren's -1.1% MoS reflects accurate valuation. No major new negative developments.

MU.name: Micron Technology
bull: HBM3E สำหรับ NVIDIA GB200 = sole US supplier, margin สูง 5-6x vs DRAM ปกติ

charlie.summary: Warren's cyclical warning is appropriate. Fwd EPS $102 reflects peak HBM pricing — trough EPS could be $20-25. Analyst target $584 is significantly below current $724. Market is pricing near-perfect HBM supercycle continuation. SK Hynix and Samsung HBM ramp = competition increasing.
risks: Stock $724 vs analyst target $584 = 24% above consensus = elevated downside risk

MRVL.name: Marvell Technology

Valuation P/E สูงในบริบท fabless semiconductor cyclicality

charlie.summary: IMPORTANT UPDATE: Marvell Q4 FY2026 BEAT significantly — revenue $2.219B, stock surged +18.35% post-earnings. FY2027 outlook raised to $11B (30%+ YoY), FY2028 near $15B (~40% YoY). Stock at ALL-TIME HIGHS. Warren's analyst target of $139 was PRE-guidance-raise. The current $176 reflects post-Q4-beat repricing. Warren's -9.2% MoS may be too conservative given new guidance. However, stock at ATH = momentum-driven and could correct. CAUTION rather than DISAGREE.
risks: Stock at ALL-TIME HIGHS post-Q4 beat — momentum crowded, correction risk elevated
Warren's -9.2% MoS calculated with old analyst targets (pre-guidance-raise) — actual MoS likely positive now
FY2027 $11B guidance = ambitious, any miss = sharp selloff from ATH
Revenue concentration in hyperscalers (80%+) remains structural risk

charlie.summary: CEO succession confirmed: Tim Cook → John Ternus effective September 1, 2026 (announced April 20, 2026). Cook becomes Executive Chairman — transition is orderly. Ternus has 20+ years at Apple with hardware engineering background. However, this is still a material near-term risk given Cook's 15-year role defining Apple's culture and investor confidence. Warren's -6.1% MoS suggests current overvaluation before any uncertainty premium.
risks: CEO transition Sep 1, 2026 — Ternus unknown to markets = potential multiple compression risk
Cook → Executive Chairman provides continuity but MSFT-type transition risk during CEO handover
China competition (Huawei) and tariff risk persisting
iPhone cycle mature — PEG 2.61 = expensive for 12% growth

charlie.summary: Thesis intact. DC orders +240% YoY backlog narrative confirmed. Boyd Thermal acquisition completing grid-to-chip portfolio. PEG 3.02 concern noted by Warren is valid — expensive relative to EPS growth. At fair value currently.

Boyd dilution short-term

charlie.summary: MAJOR UPDATE: NVIDIA took $5B equity stake in Intel (217.4M shares at $23.28, FTC approved). 18A entered high-volume manufacturing (HVM) in early 2026 — Panther Lake and Clearwater Forest server chips shipping from Fab 52. This is a fundamental change to the thesis that Warren did not fully account for. However, 18A yields still 'industry-standard' not until 2027, and NVIDIA simultaneously STOPPED 18A process testing (separate from the equity investment). Current price $108 has already priced in NVIDIA backing (3.6× above NVIDIA's $23.28 purchase price). Warren's Weighted FV $90 = likely too conservative given NVIDIA strategic stake.
risks: NVIDIA STOPPED 18A manufacturing test (separate from equity deal) — yield concerns real (65-75% vs industry standard needed)
Industry-standard yields not expected until 2027 — execution gap real
Stock at $108 vs NVIDIA purchase price $23 = most of upside may be priced in
Warren's analyst target $85 was pre-NVIDIA deal — fair value higher now but $108 still aggressive

charlie.summary: Warren's PASS verdict confirmed. Optimus Gen 3 reveal PUSHED AGAIN to 'middle of 2026' (was expected Q1 2026). Production at Fremont starting Aug 2026. Texas factory 10M unit target = aspirational. Musk: 'impossible to predict' production rates. EV margins still compressed. P/E 168× and PEG 5.81 = Warren's PASS is appropriate.
